ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Continued To Jul-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ruth Sullivan for and with Rene Martinez (Petitioner).

Ms. Sullivan stated that no one has objected to the petition and that the petitioner has waived bond. The Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary was continued to June 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Sullivan to file a declartion with regard to the insurance policy being an accidental death policy and it having no value, and the issue that other Individuals were given the opportunity to take what they desired (personal property).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Continued To Jun-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
